title: Oceanic sword remastered
description: Adds a mythical pirate blade to your world allowing you to harness the power of the seas.
body:
When you kill an elder guardian in an ocean monument it now drops a new item: The Rottensword

![Rottensword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/244ddeed9a6ef0e5e6dcd2706258095caa9e9302_0.webp)

With a new starfish you can craft it together with a tide armor trim to make the Coral infused smithing template. Combine that with a heart of the sea and The Rottensword to get the Oceanic sword

![Oceanic sword recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95e40af0de842e170a3753d99aa13a0682e3d3e6.png)

The oceanic sword gives you Regeneration, Dolphins grace and Conduit power when you're in water.
It also let's you use a dash ability when you right click.

![Oceanic sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2892795791e6572f7c8525d130e0a0174a4823d_0.webp)

The 2 new enchantments are for the Oceanic sword:
Raging storm I and II: This enchantment lowers the cooldown of your sword after using the ability (level I by 2 seconds and level II by 5 seconds)
Tidal wave: Tidal wave replaces your dash with a powerful AOE attack knocking back entities.

Planned updates: A brand new weapon, a new structure, a new mini boss and new enchantments.

Thank you for playing my mod it is still in it's early stages so if you find any bugs please report them.
